summary: Complete frontend testing of Spyco Group Portal - All features tested successfully with comprehensive CRUD operations, SPY COMMS tool, and navigation verification
passed_tests: Login functionality with credentials jimmy/spyco2024
Dashboard loads with statistics (5 Properties, 3 Tenanted, 3 Projects, 1 Invoice, 5 Contacts)
Properties page - view list, add new property, income calculations ($2,580 weekly, $11,171 monthly, $134,160 yearly)
Suppliers page - view list, add new supplier with categories and contact info
Projects page - view list, add new project with status tracking
Invoices page - view list, add new invoice with SPY COMMS references
SPY COMMS tool - generates subject lines (20260318_INVOICE_ELEC_RESI_12-LLO_BAY) and filenames with suffix
Reference tables - manage lookup codes across 6 categories (Subject, Systems, Structure, Sites, Suppliers, Financial)
Documents page loads correctly
Navigation between all pages works correctly with active state indicators
Logout functionality returns to login page
Data persistence via localStorage working correctly
Copy to clipboard functionality in SPY COMMS
Clear All functionality in SPY COMMS resets form
Dropdown population from properties and suppliers data
Modal forms for all CRUD operations working
Search functionality present on all data tables
Responsive sidebar navigation with proper icons and labels
User session management and display (Jimmy - Admin role)
Income calculations automatically update when properties change
